title: The Sports Broadcasting Signals (Mandatory Sharing with PrasarBharati) Act, 2007
full_text: The Sports Broadcasting Signals (Mandatory Sharing with PrasarBharati) Act, 2007 खेल प्रसारण सिगनल (प्रसार भारती के साथ अनिवार्य हिस्सेदारी) अधिनियम, 2007 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200711 Act Number: 11 Enactment Date: 2007-03-19 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The Sports Broadcasting Signals (Mandatory Sharing with PrasarBharati) Act, 2007 Hindi Title: खेल प्रसारण सिगनल (प्रसार भारती के साथ अनिवार्य हिस्सेदारी) अधिनियम, 2007 Long Title: An Act to provide access to the largest number of listeners and viewers, on a free to air basis, of sporting events of national importance through mandatory sharing of sports broadcasting signals with Prasar Bharati and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Information and Broadcasting Enforcement Date: 11-11-2005 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Sports Broadcasting Signals (Mandatory Sharing with PrasarBharati) Act, 2007 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II MANDATORY SHARING OF SPORTS BROADCASTING SIGNALS WITH PRASAR BHARATI CHAPTER III POWERS OF THE CENTRAL GOVERNMENT TO ISSUE GUIDELINES CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Mandatory sharing of certain sports broadcasting signals. Section 4. Penalties. Section 5. Power of the Central Government to issue Guidelines. Section 6. Validation. Section 7. Power of the Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Rules and Guidelines to be laid before Parliament. Section 9. Saving. Section 10. Repeal and saving.
